name: Vanilla Icing Glaze (Fat Free)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 to 2 tablespoons skim milk or orange juice or lemon juice or strong coffee or bourbon
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the sugar, 1 1/2 tablespoons milk or other liquid, and the extract. Add a few more drops of liquid if needed to make the glaze soft enough to drip from a spoon.
2. Drizzle lacy-looking lines of the icing over pastry, or spread it in a thin layer with the back of a spoon, letting it drip down the sides of the pastry or cake.
YIELD: 1/3 cup; enough for one 9-inch pie or cake or 12 large cream puffs
